title: Pawkaboo Natural Dog Treat - Rabbit Ears with Fur for dogs Dog Chew Hairy Rabbit ears - Hypoallergenic Treat (250g)
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: ✅ Hypoallergenic & Grain-Free – Ideal for dogs with food sensitivities or allergies. ✅ Long-Lasting Chew – Helps reduce plaque and tartar buildup, promoting dental health.
description: Product Description Furry rabbit ears provide an excellent source of fibre for your dog’s diet and can help flush out any nasties in your dog’s digestive system, such as parasite eggs. They also aid in settling tums with acid reflux. It is believed that the fur brushes through the intestines and dislodges worms and eggs in the digestive system. Hairy rabbit ears are beneficial when used as part of a natural deworming protocol. For many, these Rabbit Ears with Fur offer a tasty chew with an added benefit, whilst the chew entertains and provides a range of nutrients the fur helps as a natural de-wormer and could form part of a natural de-worming regime. Benefits: – Perfect in cleaning teeth – Acts as natural protection against worms – Helps to clear away food residue – Hypoallergenic – Air dried Rabbit Ears with Hair - Natural Tasty Chew Rabbit Ears with Hair - Natural Dewormer 100% NATURAL FURRY RABBIT EARS: LOW FAT & LOW ODOUR NATURAL DE-WORMER & DENTAL CHEW Composition 100% rabbit ears. Analytical Constituents Crude protein 46.8%, crude fat 21.5%, moisture 7%, ash 1.02%, crude fibre 0.6%. natural dog treat Rabbit Ears with Hair - Natural Dewormer Natural tasty chew, with the added benefits of being a natural de-wormer 100% NATURAL FURRY RABBIT EARS: LOW FAT & LOW ODOUR NATURAL DE-WORMER & DENTAL CHEW Composition 100% rabbit ears. Analytical Constituents Crude protein 46.8%, crude fat 21.5%, moisture 7%, ash 1.02%, crude fibre 0.6%. natural dog treat
